title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Faculty of Business and Administrative Sciences

Announcements

2024 - 2025 Spring Semester Single Course and Grade Enhancement Exams

03
						June

2025

Dear Students,

Applications for the 2024-2025 Spring Semester Single Course or Grade Enhancement Exam will be done by

To apply for the single course or grade enhancement exam students must fill in the "Single Course Exam Application Petition" or “Application Petition to Increase Grade Exam” available on the website and submit to the Faculty Secretariat in person.

The exams of the students whose single course or grade enhancement exam applications are accepted will be held on

June 20 , 2025. 11.00 a.m.

The students who are eligible to take single course or grade enhancement exam will be informed by e-mail, hence it is vital to check your e-mail boxes.

Good luck

Single Course Exam Application Petition

Application Petition To Increase Grade Exam
